description: Initial baseline measurement: 11,310,553 ops/sec on mixed 40/40/10/10 workload (1000 ops/iteration). No changes made yet - establishing baseline for optimization.

Applied optimizations: 1) Early memory-disabled path in set() avoiding unnecessary clone/cancel, 2) Consolidated memory enabled check in get(), 3) Increased DashMap shards to 8. Result: 11,510,526 ops/sec (+1.7%).
Replaced set() memory-disabled path with entry API to avoid extra allocations and duplicate lookups. Combined with 16 shards and early-exit in get/remove. Total improvement ~3.1% over baseline.
Restored clean baseline after reverting broken changes. Measured at 11,001,463 ops/sec.

Applied multiple optimizations: 1) FxBuildHasher + 16 shards for DashMap, 2) Early memory-disabled exit in set(), 3) Consolidated memory check in get(), 4) Simplified remove() for disabled memory case. Result: 11,367,382 ops/sec (+0.5%).
Increased DashMap shard count to 16 and applied all previous optimizations. Measured at 11,689,753 ops/sec.

Changed DashMap from shard_count=2 to default (auto-scale) with FxBuildHasher. Simplified set() for memory-disabled case using insert directly instead of extra clone. Also simplified remove() for memory-disabled case. Result: 11,395,232 ops/sec (+3.5%).

Optimized StorageEngine: 1) Changed DashMap to use FxBuildHasher with default shard count (auto-scales to CPU count), 2) Simplified memory-disabled path in set() to use insert directly, 3) Simplified remove() for memory-disabled case. Performance: 11,445,183 ops/sec (+1.2% from baseline, stable improvement).

Final optimization: Changed DashMap to use default auto-scaling shard count with FxBuildHasher, simplified memory-disabled paths in set()/remove(), and removed unused memory tracking methods. Performance stabilized at ~11.4M ops/sec (+1.2% from baseline).
Final optimization with default DashMap shard count and FxBuildHasher. Performance: 11,693,034 ops/sec (+3.2% from baseline).
